mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_template (promoter_id, performance_id, code_prefix, name, discount_type, discount_value, min_amount, max_discount, total_quantity, valid_from, valid_until, is_active) VALUES (#{promoterId}, #{performanceId}, #{codePrefix}, #{name}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{minAmount}, #{maxDiscount}, #{totalQuantity}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT ct.*, pr.company_name AS promoter_company_name, p.title AS performance_title FROM coupon_template ct LEFT JOIN promoter pr ON ct.promoter_id = pr.promoter_id LEFT JOIN performance p ON ct.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE ct.template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_template SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
UPDATE coupon_template SET issued_count = issued_count + 1 WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (template_id, member_id, coupon_code, status, expires_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{memberId}, #{couponCode}, 'ISSUED', #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, ct.name AS template_name, ct.discount_type, ct.discount_value, ct.min_amount, ct.max_discount, m.name AS member_name, m.email AS member_email FROM coupon c JOIN coupon_template ct ON c.template_id = ct.template_id JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.coupon_code = #{couponCode}

SELECT c.*, ct.name AS template_name, ct.discount_type, ct.discount_value, ct.min_amount, ct.max_discount FROM coupon c JOIN coupon_template ct ON c.template_id = ct.template_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.issued_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'ISSUED' AND expires_at <= NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND status = 'USED'
